title: Last day to sign up for Everyday Traveler
excerpt: Here's a little sneak peek at one of my step-by-step photos for an online class I'm contributing to at Studio Calico called Everyday Traveler . Registration closes today and class begins July 6, 2015 - hope to see you in…
body: Here's a little sneak peek at one of my step-by-step photos for an online class I'm contributing to at Studio Calico called Everyday Traveler.  Registration closes today and class begins July 6, 2015 - hope to see you in the classroom!
